Oily T-zone but still dealing with uneven skin tone? 👀 Your skin barrier might be trying to tell you something. When your barrier is weakened, your skin can overproduce oil while becoming more prone to irritation, redness, and dark spots. 💙 Barrier-loving tips: ✔️ Use a gentle cleanser ✔️ Keep skin hydrated ✔️ Look for ceramides & panthenol ✔️ Wear SPF daily ✔️ Stay consistent with your routine #SkinBarrier #OilySkin #UnevenSkinTone #SkinCareTips #eternalbright GlowingSkin SkincareRoutine BarrierRepair Ceramides SPFEveryday SkinHealth BeautyTips
